sentences.translation: Abirino čitanje nestalo je iz torbe.
sentences.translationEn: Abeer's book disappeared from her bag.

sentences.arabic: تَذَكَّرَتْ أَنَّهَا وَضَعَتْهُ فِيهَا فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Sjetila se da ga je ujutro stavila u nju.
sentences.translationEn: She remembered that she had put it in it in the morning.

sentences.translation: Pitala je prijateljicu je li ga vidjela.
sentences.translationEn: She asked her friend if she had seen it.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الصَّدِيقَةُ: أَخَذْتُهُ لِأَقْرَأَهُ، نَسِيتُ أَنْ أَطْلُبَ إِذْنًا.
sentences.translation: Prijateljica je rekla: Uzela sam ga da ga pročitam, zaboravila sam tražiti dozvolu.
sentences.translationEn: The friend said: I took it to read, I forgot to ask permission.

sentences.arabic: عَفَتْ عَبِيرُ عَنْ صَدِيقَتِهَا وَأَعَارَتْهَا الْكِتَابَ بِرِضًا.
sentences.translation: Abeer je oprostila prijateljici i pozajmila joj knjigu s radošću.
sentences.translationEn: Abeer forgave her friend and lent her the book willingly.
